svg.text: Transparent API proxy + web-based Claude Code terminal + capabilities manager
One integrated server (clairview-tools) — auto-started, add custom tools via the dashboard
Reports tool calls back to inspector via WS
Pre-populated handler + params for common patterns
Test tools directly from the edit modal
Param inputs from schema, latency timing
Skills, Agents & Hooks — Claude Code Extensions
Managed in the Capabilities tab. Stored in .claude/ — auto-discovered by Claude Code.
Reusable prompt templates that Claude triggers automatically
based on description match, or users invoke via /name
description: Create a git commit with a well-crafted message
Specialized sub-agents with custom system prompts,
description: Fast search agent for exploring codebases
Shell commands or prompts that run before/after
Claude Code events (tool calls, stops, prompts)
PreToolUse & PostToolUse support tool name matchers
e.g. only fire on Bash, Write, or specific tools
Create custom skills with SKILL.md + templates, scripts, examples
Edit in browser, preview frontmatter, manage supporting files
Define custom agents with system prompts and tool restrictions
Wire hooks to lifecycle events with visual editor
Stored in settings.local.json, applied to all Claude sessions
On startup, Claude Code scans .claude/ for skills, agents, hooks. Skills are matched by description or invoked via /name. Agents are spawned as sub-processes. Hooks fire on matching lifecycle events.
Traffic captured by the proxy for inspection
Works transparently — Claude Code sees no difference
When Claude asks a question, the proxy intercepts it
Question appears in browser — answer from any device
Response injected seamlessly, Claude never knows
Draggable panel with status, deps, blocking
Send prompts from any device, streamed responses in real time
Every request, response, SSE event, tool call, token count
Switch, resume, delete sessions. Persisted across restarts
Zero-latency SSE tap. Claude Code sees no difference
Model, effort, perms, tools, budget, prompts + MCP servers
Create, edit, test custom tool servers from the browser
Full CRUD for all Claude Code extensions in .claude/
Input, output, cache read/creation per interaction
Hierarchical timeline: turn > tool calls with full payloads
Every exchange saved as structured JSON for offline analysis
Bright checker-paper + Tokyo Night dark, persisted to localStorage
